alkylation reagent: alkylated by adding Tris (2-carboxyethyl) phosphine and 2-chloroacetamide
alkylation concentration: to a final concentration of 15 mM
cleavage agent: samples were enzymatically digested with trypsin
instrument: analyzed on a Ion Trap mass spectrometer
labeling: enabled us to visualize bacterial cells collected directly from the natural environment
reduction reagent: reduced and alkylated by adding Tris (2-carboxyethyl) phosphine
reduction concentration: to a final concentration of 5 mM
